case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS ESCOBAR OSCAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,181.66 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR $1,181.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS O/C. BEGINNING 11/11/99 DEBTOR TO PAY CREDITOR $100.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID.
PAYMENTS ARE DUE BY THE 11TH OF EACH MONTH. HEARD BY COMM. KAPLAN ON 08-26-99.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $760.65 AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR
INSTALLMENT PAYMENT TERMS NOT ENTERED THROUGH A MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT. TERMS ONLY BY CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. WRIT COULD BE ISSUED ASAP.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMT OF JUDGMT FILED ONLY NOT ENTERED IN THE COMPUTER. NO NEED TO FILE PETSA.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $965.67 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPT.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FOR HEARING ON CLAI M OF EXEMPTION SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE. FEE OF TEN DOLLARS PAID.
CASE CON'T TO AUG. 26, 1999 FOR CLAIM OF EXEMPTION CAN'T CONTINUE CASE IN COMPUTER. COPY OF ORDER SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF AUG-26-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR OSCAR
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT, PER STIP. OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
